title: Find My Device - Disconnected / Out of range device details
scenario: Find My Device shows last known location address, device name, status, last connection date, and battery percentage when headset is out of range
steps: 1. Ensure the headset is disconnected or out of range from the phone.
2. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
3. Navigate to the App Menu (e.g., hamburger menu or menu icon).
4. Tap 'Find My Device' from the menu.
5. Ensure GPS location permission is granted to the app.
6. Tap the gray geo icon on the Find My Device screen.
7. Observe the new window that appears.
expected: A new window is displayed showing: the last known location address (street & city), device name & status, date of last connection, and last known battery percentage.
